abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Shapechange (Self-Righteous Man)
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may replace itself with Ferdinand Vogel, Self-Righteous Man to heal 2.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Blood-Soaked Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has an Adversary token, this attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Pouncing Strike
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with a different enemy model within 5". Then, declare this action again, targeting that enemy model.

triggers.name: Piercing
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

triggers.name: Pick the Bones
triggers.text: After killing, this model may declare the Interact action after resolving the current action.

actions.name: Baying Howl
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target must pass a TN 11 Wp duel or gain an Adversary token. Then, move another friendly beast within range up to 3".

triggers.name: Bad Moon Rising
triggers.text: Look at the top three cards of the target's fate deck. This model may discard one non-joker looked at this way. Place the rest back in any order.
